statement: In every magma, Equation 2801 (`x = ((y * z) * (y * w)) * z`) implies Equation 311 (`x * x = x * (y * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0141
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op y w)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op x (op y z))
